result.stdout:
DiD.Idefix:
  Shows Idefix as Ascii art

Usage:
  DiD.Idefix [options] [command]

Options:
  --version         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

Commands:
  wiggle    Shows Ascii art of Idefix wiggling his tail.
  owner     Tells you who the real owner of Idefix is.
  tool      Exposes sub-commands regarding the tool
